subject: Saving your team hours on service requests
body:
Hi,

I came across DCAC Air Conditioning and wanted to reach out. Your team clearly does great work serving Central Florida.

I noticed your service requests come in through a simple form. We help HVAC companies automate the intake process, so when a customer fills out a request, it automatically creates a job ticket, sends a confirmation, and slots into your schedule. No more copy-pasting between email and your calendar.

Worth a 10-minute call this week to see if it fits?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: Basic website with contact form only
